description: Configure JFrog Artifactory as a caching proxy for Maven Central by creating a Remote Repository with the Key 'central-proxy-test', Package Type 'Maven', and URL 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/'. Cache the artifact 'org.apache.commons:commons-collections4:4.4' through this proxy (URL: http://localhost:8082/artifactory/central-proxy-test/org/apache/commons/commons-collections4/4.4/commons-collections4-4.4.jar) and verify that 'commons-collections4-4.4.jar' is stored in the 'central-proxy-test' repository.
